full_text:
Dong (Jizhong)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong, styledJizhong, was born in Hongnong. Very poor, he mocked his brother for studying. His brother became a minister. Dong was affiliated with Duan Wei.
